title: Vitamin D and Depression: A Clinical Study
abstract: This study explores the relationship between vitamin D deficiency and depressive symptoms in adults.

title: Role of Vitamin D in Brain Function
abstract: Vitamin D influences neurotransmitter regulation and mood disorders including depression.

title: Nutrition and Mental Health Outcomes
abstract: Dietary patterns and micronutrient levels are linked to mental health conditions such as anxiety and depression.

title: Inflammation and Depression Pathways
abstract: Inflammatory markers are associated with major depressive disorder and may interact with vitamin levels.
